case_title: RONALD LEROY CADY VS. TERRY ALLEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF RONALD CADY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERRY ALLEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2017 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CADY, RONALD LEROY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, TERRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
